title: Aggregate Feature
description: Places a collection of features in arbitrary order. All features in the collection use the same input position.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

features.description: Collection of features to be placed one by one. No guarantee of order. All features use the same input position.

early_out.description: Optional. Do not continue placing features once either the first success or first failure has occurred. (Note: This field is likely to be changed in future versions)
